inputs.label: Data Points
inputs.businessContext: List of numerical values for which median is calculated. Required for any statistical analysis.

inputs.label: Data Values
inputs.businessContext: The actual numerical values. Must be provided as a comma-separated list or array. Used in median calculation.

inputs.label: Sort Order
inputs.businessContext: Order to sort data before finding median. Ascending is standard.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in data accuracy. Used for adjusted median calculation.

thresholds.dataConfidence < 80: Low data confidence may affect reliability
thresholds.dataPoints < 5: Small sample size may not represent population

formulas.median: if n % 2 == 1 then sortedData[(n+1)/2] else (sortedData[n/2] + sortedData[n/2 + 1]) / 2
